html.body: [-:-] Given input is not a valid SBGN-ML file. [submap:entityVertex_5673001_324] Submaps are not supported. [submap:entityVertex_1257604_300] Submaps are not supported. [submap:entityVertex_1489509_303] Submaps are not supported. [process-arcs:reactionVertex_1524182_316] Product lines should be reversed [process-arcs:reactionVertex_186786_38] Product lines should be reversed [process-arcs:reactionVertex_389083_55] Product lines should be reversed [process-arcs:reactionVertex_382061_19] Product lines should be reversed [process-arcs:reactionVertex_186785_6] Product lines should be reversed [process-arcs:reactionVertex_8865276_425] Product lines should be reversed [process-arcs:reactionVertex_186800_90] Product lines should be reversed [process-arcs:reactionVertex_380780_110] Product lines should be reversed [process-arcs:reactionVertex_8864036_400] Product lines should be reversed [process-arcs:reactionVertex_389086_67] Product lines should be reversed [process-arcs:reactionVertex_1524186_314] Product lines should be reversed [process-arcs:reactionVertex_8865275_420] Product lines should be reversed [process-arcs:reactionVertex_186834_131] Product lines should be reversed [SquareCompartment:compartmentVertex_17957_4] CellDesigner requires thickness to be at least: 2.5 [SquareCompartment:compartmentVertex_17963_45] CellDesigner requires thickness to be at least: 2.5 [SquareCompartment:compartmentVertex_70101_184] CellDesigner requires thickness to be at least: 2.5
